caption: A man with dark hair, wearing a light-colored collared shirt and a dark blazer, is seated in front of a light blue and white backdrop. The backdrop features recurring logos of a blue cube and text that includes "theCUBE", "BigDataSV", and "2015". In the first frame, a blue text box appears on the left identifying the man as "RISHI YADAV | @meditativesoul", noting he is the "CEO" of "infoObjects". He is gesturing with his hands while speaking. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to talk and smile, shifting his posture slightly. A white laptop with a blue cube sticker on the lid is visible on the table in front of him, along with a clear water bottle. By the final frame, he is gesturing again with his right hand while speaking, maintaining an engaged and expressive facial expression throughout the short clip.
